exam_name: CPCU 540 — Finance and Accounting for Insurance Professionals

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric test centers. Open-book: AICPCU study materials may be referenced during exam.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID. Name must match AICPCU account exactly.
exam_rules: Open-book: AICPCU official study materials (printed or digital) are permitted during the exam. No expiry on individual passed exams. CPCU designation requires passing all 8 CPCU courses (500, 520, 530, 540, 551 or 552 or 553, 560, plus ethics requirement) within a 3-year completion window. Ethics requirement must also be fulfilled for the full designation.
renewal_options: Individual CPCU exam passes do not expire. The CPCU designation itself has no mandatory renewal exam, but CPCU Society membership and continuing education are encouraged.

retake_policy.notes: No mandatory waiting period between retakes. Full exam fee required for each retake. Individual passed exams do not expire.

official_study_resources.title: AICPCU Course Study Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official textbooks and online study tools available per course; permitted in exam room

aliases: cpcu 540 finance and accounting for insurance professionals
